topics.title: T1 Personal Income Tax
topics.summary: T1 return due 30 April each year for most individuals; 15 June for self-employed (balance still due 30 April). Balance owing accrues interest after 30 April.

topics.title: CPP & EI
topics.summary: CPP 5.95% employee on pensionable earnings up to YMPE $68,500 (2025). Additional CPP2 4% on earnings $68,500–$73,200. EI 1.64% up to $65,700.

topics.title: GST/HST
topics.summary: Federal GST 5%. Harmonized HST in ON/NB/NS/NL/PEI at 13–15%. QC uses GST + QST (9.975%). Small-supplier threshold $30,000 in revenue over four consecutive quarters.

topics.title: T4 Information Returns
topics.summary: Employers issue T4 slips to employees and file with CRA by the last day of February following the calendar year.

topics.title: Corporate Income Tax (T2)
topics.summary: Federal rate 15% general (net of SBD); small-business rate 9% on first $500k of active income. T2 due 6 months after year-end.
